title: ' Ali and the Name Abu Turab
description: According to Sulayman b. 'Umar b. Khalid al-Raqqi-Muhammad b. Salamah-Muhammad b. Ishaq40-Muhammad b. Yazid b. Khuthaym-Muhammad b. Ka'b al-Qurazi-Yazid b. Khuthaym (father of Muhammad b. Yazid b. Khuthaym)-'Ammar b. Yasir: I and 'All were companions with the Messenger of God on the expedition of al-'Ushayrah.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 07
